problem_text: As a financial analyst for a mid-sized manufacturing company, you are tasked with evaluating an investment proposal to expand production capacity. The project involves purchasing new machinery and renovating an existing facility. You need to prepare a capital budgeting report that includes calculations of the Net Present Value (NPV) and Internal Rate of Return (IRR) for the project. The proposal provides a cost estimate for the machinery but lacks specifics on the renovation costs and any potential changes in working capital. Additionally, assume a discount rate, but the basis for this rate is not provided. Your report should conclude with a recommendation on whether to proceed with the investment, considering both financial metrics and any strategic business factors you deem relevant. Present your findings to the senior management team.
internal_gaps: Changes in working capital are not detailed
Basis for the discount rate is not provided
